Title: Botanical Illustration of Mulberry Tree with Fruit and Roots
Description:
Celebrate the elegance of nature with this detailed botanical print. This vintage-style illustration captures a lush branch of a mulberry tree, complete with characteristic leaves, ripening berries, and visible roots.

Ideal for adding a sophisticated, academic touch to any room, this artwork makes a beautiful statement piece in living rooms, dining rooms, or home offices.

  • Detailed Design: The intricate cross-hatching and fine line work evoke classic scientific botanical drawings, offering an air of timeless elegance.
  • Decorative Versatility: Perfect for nature-themed decor, rustic farmhouse styles, or traditional academic settings.
  • Framed Art: Printed on high-quality paper and professionally framed, ensuring the artwork is ready to display immediately.

This piece is not only decorative but also a thoughtful gift for gardening enthusiasts, natural history lovers, or anyone who appreciates detailed botanical art.
